message:
🐛 fix: restore card loading skeletons + update WhatsNew tests (#8534) (#8537)

PR #8532 changed NetworkOverview and StorageOverview to return null
when showSkeleton is true, assuming CardWrapper would render a skeleton.
CardWrapper does not render data-loading skeletons automatically, so
cards showed blank during initial load.

Restore proper Skeleton/SkeletonStats/SkeletonList UI for both cards.
Remove isKillSwitchEnabled tests from WhatsNewModal after the
kill-switch was removed in PR #8527.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
